text:
The user wants me to help them create scripts for their presentation. They have a file called "EcoTrack_final.pdf" and they want me to read it first. Then they'll tell me who will be explaining what, and I need to create scripts for them.

However, I notice there's a system reminder about "Plan Mode" where I'm in READ-ONLY phase. I need to be careful here - I can read the file but I shouldn't make any edits or modifications until the user explicitly asks me to.

Let me first check if the EcoTrack_final.pdf file exists and try to read it.
